name: Are you him?
description:
But she'll work for the chance to be lazy.

You're the CEO.

She is a new paid intern sent to be your secretary.

She doesn't want to work, so she has an offer she hopes you'll accept.

Another 500 token bot. Its fun making these, actually. Rather than just make them shallow, I've been practicing with shorthand.

Please vote on a bot from Jan. 5 to Jan. 7
creator: _Mavuika_
